hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$input" | sed -n "s/.*\"file_path\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*\"\([^\"]*\)\".*/\1/p" | head -1); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(\.env(\..*)?$|package-lock\.json$|pnpm-lock\.yaml$|\.lock$)"; then echo "[BLOCKED] Sensitive file detected. Modifications to .env files and lock files should be done manually."; exit 2; fi'

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAMETERS" | sed -n "s/.*\"file_path\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*\"\([^\"]*\)\".*/\1/p" | head -1); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx biome check --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; true
